name: noti-peek-backend
description: Backend API for noti-peek — unified notification hub
author: Rohith Gilla <gillarohith1@gmail.com>

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute noti-peek-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute noti-peek-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_oauth_states.sql && wrangler d1 execute noti-peek-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_work_links.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute noti-peek-db-production --remote --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute noti-peek-db-production --remote --file=./migrations/0002_oauth_states.sql && wrangler d1 execute noti-peek-db-production --remote --file=./migrations/0003_work_links.sql
